response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and a track record of building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or cross-team leadership in feature flagging and telemetry infrastructure — key requirements for the Principal role.
strengths: Proven experience building scalable, distributed systems with high-throughput data handling (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) demonstrating initiative and systems thinking.
Broad technical fluency across languages (TypeScript, D, C++, Python-like via Node) and platforms, with hands-on DevOps and CI/CD experience.
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or guardrails for growth systems.
Lack of demonstrated experience with AI tools accelerating engineering velocity or building AI-first growth platforms.
Limited visibility into cross-functional stakeholder alignment or leadership in multi-team measurement initiatives.
